_summary: killCategory/killAll LIVE with triple money_flow guard + Degrade Mode (kill-switch row 'degrade_mode' + DegradeModeBinder + DegradeModeBanner + body[data-degrade=1] + Tailwind degrade: variant).
scenario: DEV console: (await import('@pkg/runtime')).killCategory('cosmetic')|('admin')|('money_flow')|killAll() — then runScenario() with body[data-degrade=1].

money_flow_guards: KILLABLE = ['cosmetic','admin'] allow-list — fail-closed for any new category
killAll() iterates KILLABLE only — money_flow ids never enter the loop

ui_surfaces: <DegradeModeBanner /> sticky top — 18px+ font, Warm Gold + Hot Pink gradient, ShieldCheck 44px, no close button
notify.important on ON transition, notify.passive on OFF transition
degrade_mode.admin_surface: /admin/ops/self-heal — KillSwitches tab, '🛡 비상 절전 모드' card with reason + Switch + AAL2 + audit log
